rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed all task objectives. It configured secure settings by creating the 'es-secure-settings' Secret with MinIO credentials and loading them into the Elasticsearch keystore on all 3 nodes via 'elasticsearch-keystore add --stdin' followed by 'POST /_nodes/reload_secure_settings' (no pod restart required). It registered the 'minio-repo' snapshot repository with the correct S3 settings (path_style_access=true for MinIO compatibility). Snapshot 'snapshot-1' completed with state=SUCCESS (1 shard, 0 failures), and files were confirmed in the MinIO bucket. Credentials were never placed in elasticsearch.yml or env vars. The stage oracle (snapshot-repo-setup) returned pass. Regression failures in stage_01 and stage_02 are pre-existing workflow composition artifacts from earlier stages, not caused by this agent's actions.
